> **Note:** Community issues are handled on a best-effort basis. Commercial
> support is available with the paid FerroDruid products on AWS Marketplace.

## FerroDruid version

<!-- Paste the output of: ferrodruid --version -->

## Deployment mode

<!-- One of: single-binary / classic 6-role / AWS Marketplace AMI / container -->

## OS / architecture

<!-- e.g. Ubuntu 24.04 on x86_64, Amazon Linux 2023 on aarch64 -->

## What happened

<!-- The actual behavior you observed, including exact error messages. -->

## What you expected

<!-- The behavior you expected instead. -->

## Minimal reproduction

<!-- The smallest ingest spec + query (SQL or native JSON) that reproduces
the problem, if applicable. A few rows of sample data help a lot. -->

## Logs

<!-- Relevant log excerpts. Please redact credentials, hostnames, and any
private data before posting. -->
